mapper.sql: id, knowledge_id, type, content, embed_status, embed_ids, embed_time, create_time, delete_time
mapper.insert:
insert into t_knowledge_doc
id,
knowledge_id,
type,
content,
embed_status,
embed_ids,
embed_time,
create_time,
delete_time,
#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{knowledgeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{embedStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{embedIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{embedTime,jdbcType=BIGINT},

#{deleteTime,jdbcType=BIGINT},
mapper.update:
update t_knowledge_doc
knowledge_id = #{knowledgeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
content = #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
embed_status = #{embedStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
embed_ids = #{embedIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
embed_time = #{embedTime,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=BIGINT},
delete_time = #{deleteTime,jdbcType=BIGINT},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update t_knowledge_doc set knowledge_id = #{knowledgeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, content = #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, embed_status = #{embedStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, embed_ids = #{embedIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, embed_time = #{embedTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, delete_time = #{deleteTime,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select:
select
from t_knowledge_doc where knowledge_id = #{knowledgeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and delete_time is null order by create_time desc
